description: Implement the Lifecycle model in internal/lifecycle/lifecycle.go. This is the mutable execution state owned by Flywheel. Define all Status constants, the Lifecycle struct, the Timestamps struct, and a NewLifecycle constructor. Reference docs/implementation-plan.md Milestone 1d for the complete struct definition and all status constants.
commit: feat(lifecycle): add lifecycle model and status constants
steps: Create internal/lifecycle/lifecycle.go with the Status type and all 12 status constants (pending, ready, running, validating, failed_validation, reviewing, rejected, merging, conflict, resolving, merged, failed)
Define the Timestamps struct with all 7 timestamp fields (CreatedAt, ReadyAt, StartedAt, CompletedAt, ReviewedAt, MergedAt, FailedAt) as *time.Time

Define the Lifecycle struct with all fields matching docs/implementation-plan.md Milestone 1d exactly (TaskID, RunID, WorkerID, Status, Branch, WorktreePath, BaseRef, BaseSHA, CurrentStep, StepsCompleted, Timestamps, Version, Retries, ResolveAttempts, Error, AgentOutput, ImplNotes, ReviewResult, MergeCommitSHA, ConflictDetails)
Implement NewLifecycle(taskID, runID, baseRef string) *Lifecycle that initializes with StatusPending and sets CreatedAt to time.Now()
acceptance_criteria: All 12 status constants are defined and match the state machine in docs/design.md
Lifecycle struct has all fields from the design doc with correct JSON tags
Timestamps struct uses *time.Time for all fields
NewLifecycle returns a lifecycle in pending status with CreatedAt set
